title: Delete Tick Logic
description: The system shall allow the owner of a campaign to delete a specific tick (except Tick 1). The system must then recalculate and cascade the state from the preceding tick to all subsequent ticks.
acceptance_criteria: A DELETE endpoint is provided for ticks.
Attempting to delete Tick 1 returns an error.
Deleting a tick triggers the timeline cascade logic for all later ticks.
All assets associated specifically with the deleted tick are removed or unlinked.
